title: knautia nevadensis var. lanceolata
intro: Knautia nevadensis var. lanceolata, also known as Lance-leafed Knautia, is a plant species in the valerian family, Valerianaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Lance-leafed Knautia is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in herbal supplements and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
